summary: Iteration 29 - SEO, Social Sharing, Legal Pages Testing COMPLETE. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Features tested: robots.txt, sitemap.xml, OG meta injection for blog articles, social share buttons (Facebook, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, WhatsApp), legal pages (mentions-legales, CGU, confidentialite), footer with social icons and legal links.
seed_data_creation: None - Existing blog articles used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO and legal features fully implemented. All pages accessible at /api/site/. OG meta injection working for blog articles. Social share buttons visible on blog article pages.

robots_txt.details: Returns valid robots.txt with User-agent:* Allow:/ and Sitemap: https://sijill.com/sitemap.xml

sitemap_xml.details: Contains 8 static pages + 14 blog article URLs. Valid XML format with proper priorities and change frequencies.

og_meta_injection.details: Server-side injects og:type=article, og:title, og:description, og:url, og:image, og:site_name, og:locale + Twitter card meta tags into HTML head.

share_buttons.details: All 4 share buttons visible: Facebook, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, WhatsApp. Each has data-testid attribute.

mentions_legales.details: Page displays with Sijill Project SAS info, 28 rue Saint-Lazare, 75009 Paris, Hostinger hosting info.

politique_confidentialite.details: Privacy policy page loads with RGPD compliance info, data collection details, user rights.

cgu.details: Terms of use page loads with 10 articles covering platform usage, IP rights, payments, etc.

footer.details: Footer contains: 3 social icons (Facebook, Instagram, YouTube), 3 legal links (mentions-legales, conditions-utilisation, confidentialite), 2 app store links (App Store, Google Play), Sijill Times link.

home_page.details: Home page loads correctly with Sijill Project branding.

cursus_page.details: Cursus page loads with 5 cursus items listed.

blog_list.details: Blog list shows 14 article cards with Sijill Times hero section.

blog_article.details: Article page loads with full content, tags, share buttons, back button. Title updates dynamically.

ui_tests.homepage: ✅ Sijill Project branding, nav links, cursus cards
ui_tests.footer: ✅ Social icons (FB/IG/YT), legal links, app store links, Sijill Times link
ui_tests.blog_list: ✅ Sijill Times hero, 14 blog cards, SEO meta tags
ui_tests.blog_article: ✅ Article content, share buttons (4), back button, dynamic title
ui_tests.mentions_legales: ✅ Sijill Project SAS info, Hostinger hosting
ui_tests.politique_confidentialite: ✅ RGPD info, data collection, user rights
